name: PM-KISAN
description: Income support of Rs 6000 per year to small and marginal farmers.
benefit: Rs 6000/year in 3 instalments of Rs 2000 each
keywords: income support kisan samman nidhi farmer money

name: Mukhyamantri Shetakari Yojana
description: Subsidy up to Rs 50000 for drip or sprinkler irrigation equipment.
benefit: Up to Rs 50,000 on irrigation equipment
keywords: drip irrigation sprinkler subsidy Maharashtra water

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme covering natural calamity losses at subsidised premium.
benefit: Insurance cover against crop loss from floods, drought, pests
keywords: crop insurance fasal bima natural calamity flood drought

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Provides short-term credit to farmers for crop cultivation at subsidised interest.
benefit: Credit up to Rs 3 lakh at 4% interest per annum
keywords: credit loan kisan credit card interest subsidy

name: Soil Health Card
description: Free soil testing and personalised nutrient recommendations for each farm plot.
benefit: Free soil health card with fertiliser recommendations
keywords: soil test health card fertiliser nutrient

name: PM-KUSUM
full_name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthan Mahabhiyan
description: Solar pump installation subsidy up to 60% for irrigation.
benefit: 60% subsidy on solar pump installation (up to 7.5 HP)
keywords: solar pump energy kusum irrigation electricity

name: Dr Babasaheb Ambedkar Krishi Swavalamban Yojana
description: Financial assistance for SC/OBC farmers for wells, sprinklers, and farm tools.
benefit: Up to Rs 2.5 lakh for well construction and irrigation tools
keywords: OBC SC Maharashtra well pump tool subsidy ambedkar
